hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); case "$cmd" in *"gh pr create"*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "IMPORTANT: A PR was just created. You MUST invoke the slack-pr skill now to post a notification to the configured Slack channel."}}' ;; esac

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); case "$cmd" in *"git push"*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "IMPORTANT: Code was just pushed. You MUST invoke the slack-pr skill now to post a push update to the Slack channel thread (if a PR exists for this branch)."}}' ;; esac
